name: cinema-analyze
description: Renku cinema analysis tools for cinematographers.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze FilmGrab stills into visual language studies.
interface.longDescription: Renku Cinema Analyze extracts stills from FilmGrab movie pages, prepares smaller FilmGrab image variants for AI vision analysis, validates structured visual-language JSON, and renders reusable browser reports for cinematographers.
defaultPrompt: Use Renku Cinema Analyze to analyze this movie page into a cinematographer-focused visual study.
Extract stills from this FilmGrab URL, analyze the visual language, and render the HTML report.
